summary: guru-review: phone-first PWA for Pass B tag review (15k staged_tags, parity-strict CLI port)

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Source spec: docs/web-review/design.md (840 lines). Implementation plan: docs/web-review/impl.md (504 lines). Pre-flight done: backup at ~/guru-backups/guru-20260425-142226-pre-web-review.db, canary 15371 staged_tags / 2548 edges / 2600 nodes recorded in manifest. Prereq todo:bdbdccd5 already merged (CLI now populates nodes.definition on is_new_concept accept; web's apply.ts must mirror this; parity harness asserts strict equivalence on the column).

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Branch strategy per impl.md: ALL 14 phases land on a single umbrella branch todo/6e91a76e (or its short prefix). Each phase commit stacks on the umbrella branch — do NOT open per-phase branches off main. Children share the parent's branch via 'todo work <child-id>'. Final merge to main is one --no-ff merge yielding one PR. Sub-phase tickets (P4a-h, P7a-b, P9a-h, P10a-d) are deferred to creation at implementation time so they don't bloat the store while the work is weeks out. Parity harness (P7b sub-ticket) is the load-bearing safety net; P14 (go-live) blocked until harness CI green for >=2 dry sessions.
